title: STEMI Transmission (Zoll X Series)
content_markdown:
#### Indications
- STEMI found on 12 lead ECG. 

#### Procedure

- Press the **12-Lead** button then press the **Acquire** button.

- In Patient Info enter **Patient Age, Patient Sex** and then the **Patient Initials** in the **LAST NAME** field and click on the Save icon (this menu will only appear for a new patient case).

- Push **12 lead snapshot** button to acquire the 12 lead.

- Press **12-Lead Transfer** button and select **CANBERRA Hospital** from the distribution list. Arrow down to **highlight** the transmit button and Press **Transmit**.

Figure 1

- The X-Series will indicate **Transmission Completed** for successful transmission.

- If **Transmission failed**, click back arrow and press **12-Lead Review Icon** select the **12-lead ECG** you would like to transmit again. **Repeat Step 4**.

Figure 2

- After patient handover at TCH and before turning off the monitor, return to the Patient Info screen and put the **VACIS case number** into the **Patient ID field**.
